case_title: ARDON, ARGELIA vs. RACINE, EDWARD A. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARDON, ARGELIA AS TO DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B. MARKETING GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP OF LOURDES S. BORREGO & EDWARD A. RACINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARDON, ARGELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B. MARKETING GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP OF LOURDES S. BORREGO & EDWARD A. RACINE $4,278.23 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,358.23
